chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3862 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.15776 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 2. 3. For orders on Misc. No.15777 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Mr. Jawed Kalwar, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Office objections to be complied with within a week. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. The petitioner’s case is that a CNIC was initially issued in his favour; however, when he applied for a fresh CNIC for the third time, a token was issued to him by the NADRA authorities, but it was subsequently cancelled without any reason being assigned. Be that as it may, let notice be issued to the Respondents as well as DAG, for 18.08.2025. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
